---
title: "ECTS Certificate - 0.25 Credits"
format: pdf
---

\vspace{2cm}

# ECTS Certificate

## 0.25 Credits

\vspace{1cm}

This is to certify that

\vspace{0.5cm}

## **[PARTICIPANT NAME]**

\vspace{0.5cm}

has successfully completed the course

\vspace{0.3cm}

# Introduction to Git & GitHub

\vspace{0.3cm}

and achieved a passing score on the final exam, hereby earning

\vspace{0.5cm}

## **0.25 ECTS Credits**

\vspace{0.5cm}

**Date:** 9 July 2026

\vspace{1cm}

---

**Course Details:**

- **Duration:** 1 day (7 hours)
- **ECTS Calculation:** 0.25 ECTS = 6.25 learning hours
- **Total Learning Time:** ~9 hours (course + exam preparation)

\vspace{1.5cm}

---

**Awarded by:**

Comprehensive Cancer Center Zurich (CCCZ)  
University of Zurich (UZH)  
University Hospital Zurich (USZ)

\vspace{0.5cm}

**Instructor:**  
Deepak Tanwar

\vspace{0.3cm}

*Swiss Institute of Bioinformatics (SIB)*

\vspace{1cm}

---

*This certificate is recognized by Swiss universities for degree and continuing education programs.*
